# GitHub metadata (this repo)

| Area | Role |
| ---- | ---- |
| [SLICE_LAYOUT.md](./SLICE_LAYOUT.md) | **Start here** for multi-project PRs: one folder name → PR body, changelog, code-review |
| [pull-requests/](./pull-requests/) | `gh pr create --body-file …/PR_BODY.md` (or `PR_BODY_P01.md`, … if several PRs that day) |
| [changelog/](./changelog/) | One `CHANGELOG.md` per **date + system** folder (+ template) |
| [code-review/](./code-review/) | `codereview.md`, `CHECKLIST.md`, per-slice review hub |
| [workflows/](./workflows/) | CI (docs lint, link check, structure) |
| [ISSUE_TEMPLATE/](./ISSUE_TEMPLATE/) | Bug / feature forms |
